name: Lightly Curried Mussel Wonton Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Pounds New Zealand green lip mussels
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over high heat, sauté the butter, onion, shallots, and parsley for about 3 minutes.
2. Add white wine and clam juice and bring to a boil.
3. Add mussels, cover, and simmer for 8 to 10 minutes.
4. Strain the liquid into a saucepan.
5. Bring the mussel cooking liquid to a boil in the saucepan.
6. Whisk in the curry powder and season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Add the heavy cream and cook for another 5 minutes.
8. Shell the mussels, clean, and chop the mussel meat.
9. Mix in ginger and cilantro, seasoning with salt and pepper.
10. Evenly distribute the mussel mixture on each of the wonton skins and fold excess skin into the center.
11. Bring the soup back to a boil and add the wontons.
12. Simmer for three minutes, serve immediately in soup bowls. Garnish with cilantro leaves.
Yield: 4 servings
